# NeedleBit

NeedleBit designs internal systems, MVPs, SaaS products, CRM, ERP, portals, and automation platforms for teams that outgrew spreadsheets, email, and fragile no-code setups.

## Primary site
- https://needlebit.dev/

## What we do
- Internal tools development
- MVP delivery
- SaaS product delivery
- Business process automation
- CRM / ERP implementation
- No-code / low-code system architecture
- Migration from Bubble / Glide / Airtable
- Supabase / Xano backend architecture
- n8n / Activepieces automation

## Positioning
- We offer more than development. We offer structure.
- Low-code is not about speed alone. It is about control and maintainability.

## Ideal clients
- SMBs running on Google Sheets, email, and messengers
- Founders who launched quickly and now cannot scale
- Teams trapped in fragile or expensive no-code systems
- Companies depending on one developer or one "system person"

## Contact
- hello@needlebit.systems
- Belgrade, Serbia
